title: KandyToys Hydro Storm Blaster - Splash Ball's & Catapult
features: Exciting Outdoor Fun: Get ready for hours of laughter and excitement with our kids splash ball catapult! Perfect for outdoor play, this catapult adds a splash of fun to backyard parties, pool gatherings, and beach outings
Easy to Use: Simply load the soft splashball into the catapult, pull back, and release for a thrilling launch! Kids will love experimenting with different angles and distances to perfect their aim

Safe and Durable: Made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, our splashball catapult is designed with safety in mind. The soft splashballs are gentle on hands and surfaces, ensuring worry-free playtime.

Interactive Play: Encourage active play and friendly competition as kids take turns launching the splashball and trying to hit targets or each other. It's a fantastic way to promote teamwork and social skills.

Portable and Versatile: Whether at the park, by the pool, or in the backyard, our splashball catapult is easy to take along for on-the-go fun. Compact and lightweight, it's the perfect outdoor toy for kids ages 3+
description: From the brand Previous page Here at KandyToys we have a huge range of toys brought to you with over 40 years of experience. We're home to a number of household brands including M.Y and NALU, and based down in Devon! We've got everything from unicorns and dinosaurs to paddle boards and rollerskates. Whether it's traditional games and fun indoors or adventures outside, we've got something for everyone!
